label: Transparent Alligator motif
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Alligator transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only an isolated alligator eye motif for a design-system catalog: one close cropped but complete alligator eye region with surrounding armored scales, no environment, no props, no text.
Subject: A realistic American alligator eye in stealth profile, amber-green iris with vertical black slit pupil, glossy black waterline reflection, dark green-black armored eyelid scales, water-brown ridges, subtle bayou mud texture, crisp natural scale edges, calm watchful predator focus.
Composition/framing: centered cutout with generous padding; include the full eye, brow ridge, surrounding scutes, and tapered scale silhouette without cropping the eye; compact horizontal motif suitable for a catalog cutout.
Lighting/mood: controlled studio light that preserves dark green scales, black water shadows, water-brown ridge texture, and wet reflective highlights.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #00ff00 chroma-key background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #00ff00 anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no swamp background, no full animal body, no teeth, no open mouth, no cartoon, no second animal, no text, no watermark, no props, no landscape, no decorative background, no cast shadow, no contact shadow, no reflection.

label: Light design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode design-system board for "Morphous Alligator" / "Alligator Eye", a stealth monitoring system derived from a realistic alligator eye motif: dark green-black armored scales, amber-green slit eye, black water shadows, water-brown ridges, and swamp bayou neutrals.
Canvas: exact wide 16:9 board, high-resolution 4K-class source, target 3840x2160. Large readable labels, clean grid, no tiny microtext.
Required visible sections: title "Morphous Alligator", motif story, palette swatches with hex labels, typography, Japanese typography with 日本語 UI examples, components, navigation, dashboard/data/charts, forms, table, command/search, status states, texture, radius, spacing, shadow, token samples, and generated asset examples.
Palette direction: Bayou Fog #eef1e7, Gator Black #10170f, Scale Green #243b24, Deep Water #17241e, Mud Brown #6f5638, Iris Amber #c49a3b, Duckweed #71845d, Reed Tan #c4b693, Warning Rust #9a4c2f.
Typography: English guidance for Inter or Geist-style dense monitoring UI; Japanese guidance for Noto Sans JP, tabular numbers, compact sensor labels, and readable operations hierarchy.
UI style: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style product system, stealth monitoring UI, 8px radius, thin scale-ridge dividers, wet black focus rings, dark green active controls, mud-brown secondary surfaces, amber eye status dots, bayou-neutral cards, restrained charts.
Sample product context: swamp perimeter monitoring dashboard with waterline sensors, thermal sightings, motion zones, camera traps, humidity, battery status, patrol notes, incident table, search command, alert states, and navigation sections.
Text: use short readable UI labels; no paragraphs. Include English and Japanese guidance clearly. No watermark or random brand names.
Constraints: no generic blue or purple gradients, no unrelated saturated colors, no cartoon alligator, no teeth mascot, no fake company logos, no illegible microtext, no watermark, no random brand names.

label: Dark design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for "Morphous Alligator" / "Alligator Eye". It must feel like the same stealth monitoring design system translated to dark mode, derived from a realistic alligator eye motif and the corrected light-mode board language: armored dark green scales, amber-green slit eye, black water shadows, water-brown ridges, and swamp bayou neutrals.
Canvas: exact wide 16:9 board, high-resolution 4K-class source, target 3840x2160. Large readable labels, clean grid, no tiny microtext.
Required visible sections: title "Morphous Alligator", "Dark Mode", palette swatches with hex labels, typography, Japanese typography with 日本語 UI examples, components, navigation, dashboard/data/charts, forms, table, command/search, status states, texture, radius, spacing, shadow, token samples, and generated asset examples.
Palette direction: Bayou Night #08110c, Mist Text #edf1e7, Scale Green #2f4a2f, Deep Water #14241d, Mud Brown #73583b, Iris Amber #c89f3f, Duckweed #81906a, Reed Tan #c7b991, Warning Rust #a65334.
Visual details: deep green-black backgrounds rather than pure black, readable mist text, wet black panels, scale-ridge borders, amber eye status lights, dark green active states, mud-brown secondary surfaces, bayou tan muted labels, restrained chart colors, 8px radius, shadcn/tweakcn controls.
Sample product context: swamp perimeter monitoring dashboard with waterline sensors, thermal sightings, motion zones, camera traps, humidity, battery status, patrol notes, incident table, search command, alert states, and navigation sections.
Text: use short readable UI labels; no paragraphs. Include English and Japanese guidance clearly. No watermark or random brand names.
Constraints: no neon cyberpunk, no generic purple gradients, no unrelated saturated colors, no cartoon alligator, no teeth mascot, no fake company logos, no illegible microtext, no watermark, no random brand names.
